caliber_inches.description: Bore diameter in inches (3 decimal places)

barrel_length_in.description: Barrel length in inches (1 decimal place)

muzzle_diameter_in.description: Muzzle OD in inches (3 decimal places)

sight_height_mm.description: Sight height in mm (2 decimal places)

angular_sigma_moa.description: Gun physical dispersion in MOA (2 decimal places)

chamber_time.description: Time in seconds for chamber heating model (milliseconds precision)

wall_thickness_mm.description: Wall thickness in mm (2 decimal places)

ammo_temp.description: Default ammunition temperature in °C (2 decimal places)
